title: onosma zagrica
intro: Onosma zagrica, also known as Onosma, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Balkans and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The medicinal properties of Onosma zagrica lie in its alkaloid content, which has been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Onosma zagrica is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
